testcase.name: testRealDailyMotionDataExtraction

Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. Explicitly configure spring.jpa.open-in-view to disable this warning 2026-05-03T19:03:37.431+02:00 INFO 21140 --- [DailyMotionMiner] [ main] a.DailyMotionMiner.ChannelServiceTest : Started ChannelServiceTest in 6.503 seconds (process running for 8.59)
======================================================= 🚀 INICIANDO TEST DE INTEGRACIÓN REAL CON DAILYMOTION =======================================================
✅ Se han extraído 10 canales correctamente. Buscando vídeos...

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\nacho\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
